name: Bamboo Toothbrush
shortDescription: A sustainable alternative to plastic toothbrushes.
longDescription:
Our bamboo toothbrush is made from organically grown bamboo and features soft, BPA-free bristles for a gentle clean. It is biodegradable and helps reduce plastic waste in your daily routine.

Perfect for environmentally conscious individuals, this toothbrush combines functionality with eco-awareness. Switch to bamboo and contribute to a cleaner planet with every brush.

name: Reusable Metal Straw Set
shortDescription: Stainless steel straws to replace single-use plastic ones.
longDescription:
This set includes four stainless steel straws, a cleaning brush, and a convenient travel pouch. They're durable, rust-resistant, and easy to clean — ideal for smoothies, iced coffee, or juices.

Say goodbye to plastic waste and make a stylish, eco-friendly switch. Compact and reusable, this set is perfect for eco-conscious sipping on the go.

name: Organic Cotton Tote Bag
longDescription:
Crafted from 100% certified organic cotton, this tote bag is the perfect replacement for single-use plastic bags. It's strong, durable, and stylish enough to take anywhere — from markets to work.

With reinforced stitching and a minimalist design, it offers both practicality and eco-friendliness in one. Carry your essentials with a lower environmental impact.

name: Compostable Garbage Bags
longDescription:
These compostable garbage bags are made from corn starch and other renewable resources. They break down naturally and leave no toxic residues behind, making them safe for home or industrial composting.

Ideal for kitchens and offices, these bags are sturdy enough to handle regular waste while being gentle on the environment.

name: Eco-Friendly Dish Scrubber
longDescription:
Made from natural coconut coir and wood, this dish scrubber is a plastic-free solution to your kitchen cleaning needs. It's tough on grime but safe for non-stick surfaces.

Once worn out, it can be composted completely. A great sustainable switch for reducing microplastic shedding during dishwashing.

name: Reusable Beeswax Food Wraps
shortDescription: Natural food storage alternative to plastic wrap.
longDescription:
These wraps are made from organic cotton infused with beeswax, jojoba oil, and tree resin. They're washable, reusable, and breathable — perfect for wrapping sandwiches, fruits, or covering bowls.

Say goodbye to cling film and enjoy a natural, sustainable way to store your food with these biodegradable wraps.

name: Plantable Seed Paper Notebooks
shortDescription: Eco notebooks that grow into plants.
longDescription:
Made with handmade paper embedded with wildflower or herb seeds, these notebooks are a zero-waste option for students and professionals. Once you're done using them, plant the pages and watch your notes turn into flowers.

A perfect blend of sustainability and creativity, this product encourages reusability and eco-regeneration.

name: Reusable Produce Bags
shortDescription: Mesh bags for fruits and vegetables.
longDescription:
Ditch plastic produce bags with this reusable, washable mesh bag set. Made from organic cotton, they come in various sizes and have drawstring closures for convenience.

Breathable and lightweight, they keep your produce fresh longer and make your shopping trips greener.

name: Solar Powered Garden Lights
longDescription:
These decorative garden lights are powered entirely by the sun, turning on automatically at dusk. They charge during the day and provide beautiful ambient lighting for pathways, patios, or gardens.

No electricity needed — just clean, renewable solar energy that lowers your carbon footprint.

name: Biodegradable Phone Case
longDescription:
Protect your phone and the planet with this biodegradable case made from flax shive and biopolymer. It’s durable, flexible, and fits snugly while being 100% compostable after use.

An excellent zero-waste choice for conscious tech users who want both style and sustainability.

name: Upcycled Coconut Bowls
shortDescription: Handcrafted bowls made from real coconuts.
longDescription:
Each coconut bowl is unique, handcrafted from discarded coconut shells. Perfect for smoothie bowls, salads, or snacks, these are a sustainable and stylish addition to any kitchen.

Polished with natural coconut oil, they are entirely biodegradable and a great conversation starter.

name: Natural Loofah Sponge
longDescription:
Harvested from the loofah plant, this sponge is 100% natural and compostable. It expands in water and can be used for bathing or cleaning surfaces gently but effectively.

Say goodbye to synthetic sponges and embrace a cleaner, greener alternative for your daily hygiene or home care routines.
